message:
feat(atc-core): labeled-counter metrics surface and Prometheus alerts reference

ATC observability metrics
-------------------------
Adds the shared primitive that every ATC subsystem now reports
through: `LabeledCounterMap` — a `Mutex<BTreeMap<String, u64>>`
shim in `crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/metrics.rs` that exposes
`add(label, delta)` and a `snapshot()` that returns a sorted
`Vec<(String, u64)>`. The guard uses
`unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner)` so a poisoned mutex
degrades to recovered state instead of panicking, matching the
pattern used by the other `LazyLock<Mutex<...>>` metric maps in
this crate. `+289 lines` total with the counter types plus the
per-subsystem ATC metric registrations that consume them.

This is the Rust-side surface the `docs/ATC_ALERTS_EXAMPLE.yaml`
rules (see below) actually scrape, and it's what the Prometheus
gauges / histograms `am_atc_kill_switch_enabled_gauge`,
`am_atc_sweep_duration_micros_bucket{sweep_kind=...}`, and
`am_atc_derivation_errors_total{error_kind=...}` are fed from.

Attribution wrapping tweak (`atc_attribution.rs`)
-------------------------------------------------
`attribute_outcome` had one long `let most_recent = ...expect(...)`
line. cargo-fmt wrapped it across the `iter`/`min_by_key`/`expect`
chain — no logic change, just satisfies the formatter pass that
touched the file during the broader ATC work.

Prometheus alerts example (`docs/ATC_ALERTS_EXAMPLE.yaml`)
---------------------------------------------------------
New operator-facing reference for the ATC metric surface, shaped
as a Prometheus recording-rules file. Groups and alerts include:

- `AtcKillSwitchEnabled` — fires when
  `am_atc_kill_switch_enabled_gauge > 0` for a minute, with a
  runbook pointer to `docs/RUNBOOK-atc-rollback.md` and the
  storage-root `.atc_kill_switch` sentinel.
- `AtcResolutionSweepSlowP95` — fires when the
  `sweep_kind="resolution_window"` sweep duration p95 exceeds
  250ms over a 10-minute window, suggesting DB pressure or an
  open-experience backlog.
- `AtcDerivationErrorsPresent` — fires immediately when
  `am_atc_derivation_errors_total{error_kind=...}` increases,
  broken out per `error_kind` label so on-call sees which
  derivation path is misbehaving.

This file is a reference, not a deployment artifact — the patch
deliberately ships it under `docs/` with the `_EXAMPLE` suffix so
operators can copy the shape into whatever Prometheus /
Alertmanager topology their environment actually runs, rather than
checking in something we'd later have to keep synced with every
internal Prometheus config.

Scope: this commit lands the observability surface only. The
producer sites that emit the new ATC metrics land alongside the
server/TUI ATC work in the next commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+groups:
+  - name: atc-observability
+    interval: 30s
+    rules:
+      - alert: AtcKillSwitchEnabled
+        expr: am_atc_kill_switch_enabled_gauge > 0
+        for: 1m
+        labels:
+          severity: warning
+          service: mcp-agent-mail
+          subsystem: atc
+        annotations:
+          summary: "ATC learning kill switch is enabled"
+          description: "Experience writes are suppressed. Inspect the storage-root .atc_kill_switch sentinel and rollback notes in docs/RUNBOOK-atc-rollback.md."
+
+      - alert: AtcResolutionSweepSlowP95
+        expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, sweep_kind) (rate(am_atc_sweep_duration_micros_bucket{sweep_kind=\"resolution_window\"}[10m]))) > 250000
+        for: 10m
+        labels:
+          severity: warning
+          service: mcp-agent-mail
+          subsystem: atc
+        annotations:
+          summary: "ATC resolution sweep p95 is elevated"
+          description: "Resolution-window sweeps are running above 250ms p95 for 10 minutes. Check DB pressure, open-experience backlog, and slow-control traces."
+
+      - alert: AtcDerivationErrorsPresent
+        expr: sum by (error_kind) (increase(am_atc_derivation_errors_total[10m])) > 0
+        for: 0m
+        labels:
+          severity: critical
+          service: mcp-agent-mail
+          subsystem: atc
+        annotations:
+          summary: "ATC derivation errors detected"
+          description: "Experience-row construction, append, or resolution transitions are failing. Correlate with tracing events `atc.insert_experience` and `atc.resolve_experience`."
+
+      - alert: AtcSafeModeEnteringFrequently
+        expr: sum(increase(am_atc_safe_mode_transitions_total{direction=\"enter\"}[30m])) > 2
+        for: 0m
+        labels:
+          severity: critical
+          service: mcp-agent-mail
+          subsystem: atc
+        annotations:
+          summary: "ATC safe mode entered repeatedly"
+          description: "Calibration health is unstable. Inspect ATC policy telemetry, shadow disagreements, and recent outcome traces before re-enabling live learning."
+
+      - alert: AtcOpenExperienceStratumBacklog
+        expr: max by (stratum) (am_atc_experiences_open_by_stratum) > 50
+        for: 15m
+        labels:
+          severity: warning
+          service: mcp-agent-mail
+          subsystem: atc
+        annotations:
+          summary: "ATC open experience backlog is accumulating"
+          description: "A single stratum has more than 50 unresolved experiences for 15 minutes. Inspect the SystemHealth ATC widget and recent resolution traces."
